data.content: [Codex 2026-04-20] Rehydrating knot state after metadata drift. The implementation, review, and shipment evidence already recorded on this knot still apply: branch knot-98e6-shutdown-opencode, shipped commit d8c82704 on GitHub main, and passing remote Actions runs 24666326928/24666326932. Advancing the workflow again is correcting the tracker state, not redoing the code work.
